author: frido22
name: Mac mini M4 16GB Recurrent Tail QK Import-Safe
blurb: Apple Silicon / MLX non-record submission: 9x512 SP1024 tied-embedding model with a rank-64 bigram output adapter, two recurrent tail blocks, and float-kept tail Q/K reallocation. Includes an import-safe train_gpt.py path to avoid the mlx-missing CPU smoke failure seen on the previous Mac mini PR.
